evidences.title: Google Gemini 3.0: Release Timeline, Early Rollout, and How the ...
evidences.content: Nov 18, 2025 4 min read Google Gemini 3.0 reached users in late 2025 through a gradual and largely silent rollout that differed from the high-visibility launches of earlier Gemini versions. Instead of a single public release event, Google began enabling Gemini 3.0 capabilities inside the mobile app, the Canvas tool, and selective back-end systems while still displaying Gemini 2.5 labels in the interface. Signals from API changelogs, feature behavior, performance shifts, and statements made by Google leadership confirm that the transition took place in stages. Gemini 3.0 emerged as a next step in multimodal reasoning, Workspace integration, and long-context responsiveness, even before it was openly advertised as the next-generation model. ····· ..... [...] Google’s CEO stated at Dreamforce 2025 that Gemini 3.0 would be released before the end of the year, marking the first explicit acknowledgment of the model’s arrival timeline. Around the same period, API documentation revealed deprecations and transitions affecting earlier 2.x models, aligning with an infrastructure shift toward the 3.0 generation. These signals collectively confirmed that Google was preparing for a wide transi...

evidences.title: Google Gemini - Wikipedia
evidences.content: On November 18, 2025, Google launched Gemini 3 Pro, describing it as its most intelligent model to date and marking a departure from the company's previous staged release patterns, with the model made immediately available across the Gemini app, Google Search, Google AI Studio, and Vertex AI on launch day. A more capable "Deep Think" reasoning mode began rolling out to Google AI Ultra subscribers in the weeks that followed. Gemini 3 Flash, a speed-optimized variant, followed in December 2025, becoming the new default model in the Gemini app. [...] Gemini 2.5 Pro Experimental was released on March 25, 2025, as Google's first explicitly designated "thinking model", capable of reasoning through steps before responding using chain-of-thought techniques. It debuted at the top of the LMArena leaderboard, a benchmark measuring human preference for AI responses, where it remained for several months. Gemini 2.5 Flash was unveiled at Google I/O in May 2025 and reached general availability in June 2025 alongside the cost-optimized Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite. [...] On December 11, 2024, Google announced Gemini 2.0 Flash as the first model in the Gemini 2.0 generation, framing it as the beginning...

evidences.title: Google Gemini 3.0 Breakdown: New Features, Improvements & Why ...
evidences.content: Part of AI Tools series. TL;DR Summary Gemini 3.0, released on 18 November 2025, marks a clear pivot in Google’s AI strategy. Instead of a small upgrade, it introduces deeper reasoning, native multimodality, and a 1 million token context window, aiming to move from simple chat style assistance to agent like systems that can plan and execute complex tasks over time. This launch lands in the middle of a three way race between Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic, where models such as GPT 5.1 focus on speed, conversational flow, and everyday usability. Gemini 3.0 takes a different angle, it leans into high end reasoning, long context understanding, and tightly integrated tooling such as Deep Think mode, native video and audio handling, and Google’s new Antigravity agentic IDE. [...] ## Conclusion Google’s Gemini 3.0 launch post presents it as a state of the art reasoning model with native multimodality and a one million token context window that targets high end scientific, coding, and agentic workloads. It is not just a new model name, it is Google’s attempt to redefine what a general purpose AI system should be in 2025, combining deep reasoning, multimodality, and long context in a sing...

Jan 17, 2025 Everything we know: Google's Gemini 3 model gemini 3 release date | gemini 2.5 ## Has Gemini 3 been released? As of January 2025, Gemini 3 has not been released. In fact, it hasn't even been announced. Gemini Ultra 1.0 was released to the public in December 2023. Google quickly followed up with Gemini 1.5 in February 2024. Since then, Google has released experimental versions of Gemini 2.0, but there has been no official announcement of Gemini 3. ## History of Google Gemini Launches [...] ## History of Google Gemini Launches Google has launched several versions of its Gemini AI models on the following dates: Gemini 1.0: Announced on December 6, 2023 Gemini 1.5: Introduced in February 2024 Gemini 2.0: Launched on December 11, 2024 Google has ambitious goals for Gemini, aiming to reach 500 million users by the end of the year. evidences.title: Google Launches Gemini 3 AI Model, Rolling Out Immediately to ...
evidences.content: Google has launched Gemini 3, its latest artificial intelligence (AI) model, marking the company's most advanced release in the Gemini series so far. This update comes about eight months after Gemini 2.5. The company announced that Gemini 3 will be immediately available through various Google products and platforms, including its search engine, the Gemini app, and tools for developers. Gemini 3 introduces improved capabilities in areas such as coding, math, science, and multimodal tasks (which combine text, images, and other types of data). Google claims the model delivers smarter results and requires less prompting from users, making it more efficient and easier to use. [...] # Google Launches Gemini 3 AI Model, Rolling Out Immediately to Search and Developer Tools [...] The new model is proprietary, meaning it is not open source, and is available mainly through Google’s products, developer platforms, and paid APIs. This release comes as competition intensifies between Google and other AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic, who recently made similar AI advancements.

evidences.title: The latest AI news we announced in November
evidences.content: We made Gemini 3 available in Google Search for our most intelligent search yet. Gemini 3’s state-of-the-art reasoning is now available in Google Search, starting with AI Mode — marking the first time we brought a Gemini model to Search on day one. Gemini 3 grasps depth and nuance, and unlocks new experiences in Search with dynamic visual layouts, interactive tools and simulations tailored specifically for your query. Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in nearly 120 countries and territories in English can use Gemini 3 Pro by selecting “Thinking with 3 Pro” from the model drop-down menu in AI Mode. [...] We released Gemini 3, AI for a new era of intelligence. Gemini 3 is built to bring any idea to life. It represents the next step in our work to push the frontiers of intelligence, agentic experiences and personalization — so that AI is truly helpful for everyone. Gemini 3 is the best model in the world for multimodal understanding and it's our most powerful agentic and vibe coding model to date. evidences.title: Gemini 3 for developers: New reasoning, agentic capabilities
evidences.content: The Keyword Start building with Gemini 3 ["How is Gemini changing Maps?", "What is \"vibe design?\"", "How can I learn new AI skills?"] Subscribe # Start building with Gemini 3 Nov 18, 2025 · Share x.com Facebook LinkedIn Mail Whether you’re an experienced developer or a vibe coder, Gemini 3 can help you bring any idea to life. logan-headshot Logan Kilpatrick Product Lead, Google AI Studio and the Gemini API ## General summary [...] ### Gemini API With Gemini 3, we are releasing a client-side bash tool that empowers the model to propose shell commands as part of agentic workflows for tasks such as navigating your local filesystem, driving development processes, and automating system operations. We’re pairing this with a hosted server-side bash tool for multi language code generation and secure prototyping. Available now in the Gemini API for early access partners, with general availability coming soon. Additionally, Gemini hosted tools Grounding with Google Search and URL context can now be combined with structured outputs. evidences.content: REVIEWED BY Rose Velazquez | Nov 18, 2025 Web giant Google is solidifying its standing in the AI race with the launch of its latest model, Gemini 3. The move closely follows similar model upgrades from major players like Anthropic and OpenAI and is meant to improve upon prior iterations in terms of multimodal understanding and agentic and vibe software coding. Gemini’s core capabilities include synthesizing information, web development and complex project planning. Gemini 3 is built to provide concise and direct responses to offer improved insights and add nuance to interactions. It also features a Deep Think mode that flexes its multimodal understanding capabilities. The company launched Gemini 3 Pro in preview, providing access to it across various Google products. evidences.title: Google Gemini 3.0 is coming: What we know - Aragon Research
evidences.content: Google Gemini 3.0 is coming: What we know October 29, 2025 # Google Gemini 3.0 is coming: What we know By Jim Lundy ## Google Gemini 3.0 is coming: What we know Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s announcement at Dreamforce 2025—that Gemini 3.0 will be released before the end of this year—has set the industry on a highly compressed and competitive clock. This timeline comes just months after the major Gemini 2.5 release in early 2025 and poses an immediate question: Is this a genuine generational leap fueled by Google’s massive research infrastructure, or is it a strategic move to maintain market momentum against rivals like OpenAI and Anthropic? This blog overviews the Gemini 3.0 news and offers our analysis. ### Why did Google announce Gemini 3.0 with a year-end deadline?

evidences.title: Google announces Gemini 3 as battle with OpenAI intensifies - CNBC
evidences.content: The new AI model will allow users to get better answers to more complex questions, "so you get what you need with less prompting," Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai said in one of several blog posts Google published Tuesday. Gemini 3 will be integrated into the Gemini app, Google's AI search products AI Mode and AI Overviews, as well as its enterprise products. The rollout begins Tuesday for select subscribers and will go out more broadly in the coming weeks. The announcement comes about eight months after Google introduced Gemini 2.5 and 11 months after Gemini 2.0. OpenAI, which kicked off the generative AI boom in late 2022 with the public launch of ChatGPT, introduced GPT-5 in August. [...] WATCH LIVE Key Points Google announced Gemini 3, an upgraded artificial intelligence model, almost eight months after the company rolled out Gemini 2.5. The company said its latest suite of AI models will require users to do "less prompting" to get the desired results. Google also announced a new agent platform called "Google Antigravity," which lets developers code "at a higher, task-oriented level." Gemini 3 grasps depth and nuance, and unlocks new experiences in Search with dynamic visual layouts, interactive tools and simulations tailored specifically for your query. evidences.title: Get an in-depth look at Gemini 3 with CEO Sundar Pichai.
evidences.content: Watch the full conversation below, or listen to the Google AI: Release Notes podcast on YouTube, Apple Podcasts or Spotify. ## Related stories Let’s stay in touch. Get the latest news from Google in your inbox. Follow Us [...] Learn more: Learn more: Learn more: Learn more: Learn more: Learn more: For the latest episode of the Google AI: Release Notes podcast, host Logan Kilpatrick sat down with CEO Sundar Pichai last week to discuss the extraordinary progress — and future — of AI at Google. Sundar shared the thinking behind going “AI-first” all the way back in 2016, setting up key investments that led the company to this moment. And beyond current releases like Gemini 3 and Nano Banana Pro, he also shared his excitement about long-term bets for the next decade, like quantum computing. "I think in about five years we'll be having breathless excitement about quantum, hopefully, like we are having with AI today,” he said.

evidences.title: Ask anything about any place on Maps with Gemini
evidences.content: Along with the U.S., Ask Maps starts rolling out in India in English on Android and iOS, with Hindi launching soon. We look forward to continuing to unlock entirely new possibilities by combining our Gemini models with the world's most comprehensive digital map - we can’t wait to see where it takes you.
